zh.lifeSummary: 當Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont於大約1230年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓馬萊斯特洛華時，他的父親Eudon de Malestroit IV26歲，母親Agathe de Muzillac21歲。他於大約1260年與Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas在法國布列塔尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1306年在他的家鄉享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont于大约1230年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓馬萊斯特洛華时，他的父亲Eudon de Malestroit IV26岁，母亲Agathe de Muzillac21岁。他于大约1260年与Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas在法国布列塔尼结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1306年在他的家乡享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
English (Kent): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Siegmund.
German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Payen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from the Old French personal name Pagen, Paien, from Latin Paganus, from paganus ‘country-dweller’, a derivative of pagus ‘of or relating to the countryside’, possibly given to a child not yet baptized (because of its later sense of ‘pagan, heathen’). Alternatively, a nickname for a country-born person. This surname is also found in the West Indies (mainly Haiti) and Mauritius.
English: variant of   Payne  .

variants.name: Payan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Ramon, Carlos, Jesus, Leticia, Luis, Ana, Cruz, Juana, Roberto, Rodolfo.
Spanish (Payán): perhaps from Mozarab päiên ‘cave, ravine’, from Hispanic Latin pedia, derived from pedem ‘foot’. In Spain, this surname is found mainly in Andalusia.
French: Occitan variant of   Payen  .

variants.name: Pesnell
meanings: Probably an altered form of French (Normandy) Pesnel: from a vernacular pet form of the old personal name Payen , or a topographic name for someone who lived by a fence or palissade, from a shortened form of paissenel, pessenel, a diminutive of paisson, pesson ‘post, stake’. This surname was brought to North America from England.

variants.name: Pean
meanings: Anglicized form of   Beathan .

variants.name: Payne
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin an occupational name for a carter or cartwright, from Old English wægen ‘cart, waggon’. It was adopted as a given name in the second half of the 20th century, mainly as a result of the popularity of the American film actor John Wayne ( 1907–79 ), who was born Marion Michael Morrison; his screen name was chosen in honour of the American Revolutionary general Anthony Wayne ( 1745–96 ).

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont was born about 1230, in Malestroit, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Eudon de Malestroit IV, was 26 and his mother, Agathe de Muzillac, was 21. He married Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas about 1260, in Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1306, in his hometown, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont est né environ 1230, à Malestroit, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Eudon de Malestroit IV, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agathe de Muzillac, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas environ 1260, à Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1306, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont um 1230 in Malestroit, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudon de Malestroit IV 26 und seine Mutter Agathe de Muzillac 21. Er hat um 1260 in Bretagne, Frankreich Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1306 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont è nato il circa 1230 nel Malestroit, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Eudon de Malestroit IV, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agathe de Muzillac, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas circa 1260, nel Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1306, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumontが約1230年にフランスブレタグンモービハンマレストロイトで生まれた時，父Eudon de Malestroit IVは26歳，母Agathe de Muzillacは21歳であった。約1260年にフランスブレタグンでGuilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1306年に故郷で78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont(이)가 대략 1230년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 맬일스트로이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudon de Malestroit IV(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agathe de Muzillac(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1260년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1306년 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Malestroit, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Eudon de Malestroit IV, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agathe de Muzillac, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas aproximadamente 1260, em Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1306, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont родился около 1230 г. в местности меилестроит, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Eudon de Malestroit IV было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agathe de Muzillac, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas около 1260 г. в местности бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1306 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет.

sm.Abt 1230–Abt 1306: e tusa o le 1230–e tusa o le 1306

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont nació aproximadamente 1230, en Malestroit, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Eudon de Malestroit IV, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agathe de Muzillac, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas aproximadamente 1260, en Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1306, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años.
